channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Huge fly tip on westmoreland corner, 8th April
item.description:
Tons of bags and boxes overflowing with waste, food, clothing, boxes etc. It stinks and is covering the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21a, Westmoreland Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete Bollards fallen over, 8th April
item.description:
From Tesco Express petrol station to Ollies Posh Wash and by Starbucks there are concrete bollards which have fallen over and need repair or replacing because they are just laying their and the one by star bucks even has yellow barriers around them but no repairs being carried out . This side of the pavement is well used even more so now the there’s road works by the gas boards / Lidl and that pavement is closed off to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fuse's cover in the socket, 8th April
item.description:
The Fuse's cover in the socket from electrical boiler is missing (photo attached).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal Grass not cut since last year, 8th April
item.description:
Communal grass not cut since last year on Langbrook road, other roads have been done but not Langbrook road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Langbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 80 Victoria Road, 8th April
item.description:
All of the street trees on Victoria Road have been trimmed apart from 5 trees around 80 Victoria Road. They have been forgotten probably because there were cars parked there. Please can you arrange for them to be trimmed asap as spring is here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped drain gully outside st asaphs court, 8th April
item.description:
Multiple reports, many historic about this blocked drain gully
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items on street, 8th April
item.description:
Please collect, see appended picture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buttesland Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffti on Air raid shelter Midfield Way / Sevenoaks Way, 8th April
item.description:
There’s a large amount of graffiti on the air raid shelter on the corner of Midfield Way / Sevenoaks Way which needs removing please . There’s also lots of glue left each side which needs removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Valley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain gully outside station court building, 8th April
item.description:
This drain gully has been blocked for several months, has been reported multiple times.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Gibbon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes Perry Street, 8th April
item.description:
Large potholes Perry Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes Perry Street, 8th April
item.description:
Potholes Perry Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins - littering the street and spread everywehrre, 8th April
item.description:
The bins on this property on delafield road( waste and recycling) have not been collected. The waste is continually overflowing onto the street and blowing down the road. This has been ongoing since 03.04.26 - causing foxes and rodents to tear open waste - causing further waste issues on the street - waste is food and Sanitary items on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delafield Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac has been put over cycle lane but contractors have forgotten to repaint white cycle lane road markings and have left the job unfinished., 8th April
item.description:
Tarmac has been put over cycle lane but contractors have forgotten to repaint white cycle lane road markings and have left the job unfinished.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green lid waste bin, 8th April
item.description:
This bin has been dumped under the overgrown trees in Rutherglen Road near the junction with Waterdale Road SE2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By victoria mews communal bins, 8th April
item.description:
More bags being left around the victoria mews communal bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

Overflowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish, 8th April
item.description:
Rubbish strewn all over near number 1 st pauls road. Caused by them ( tenants) putting general rubbish in brown garden waste bin and overflowing into.the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Paul's Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human defecation, 8th April
item.description:
Someone has done a massive human defecation between two cars over night. It’s absolutely disgusting and unsanitary. There is also a lot of toilet roll.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House junk clearance, 8th April
item.description:
This includes a small sofa I found it when I came back after Easter weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
